purpose: Close curated evidence blockers for fee-engine unit economics and digital-infrastructure lease economics.

primary_sources.role: FY2025 revenue bridge, surface-use volume, capex, and MD&A normalization inputs
Q1 2026 run-rate cross-check; 2026 adjusted EBITDA guide $210–230M
PLP and PowerBridge digital-infrastructure lease/option economics (related-party note)

resolved_facts: FY2025 total revenue increased $89.1M. Surface use royalties rose $41.2M (+845 Mbbl/d produced-water handling volume plus acquisitions). Easements rose $27.9M (pipelines, roads, drilling locations). Resource sales/royalties rose $19.6M net. Oil and gas royalties fell $3.4M (volume and price).

FY2025 adjusted EBITDA was $177.2M, operating cash flow $126.3M, capex $4.2M, and reported free cash flow $120.0M. Q1 2026 FCF $40.9M annualizes above FY2025 but base normalization uses 2026 guide midpoint ($220M EBITDA), not run-rate.

Press references to 'Alpha Digital' do not appear as an SEC counterparty. Filed digital infrastructure economics are PLP (~2,000 acres; $8.0M deposit received Dec 2024) and PowerBridge (~2,580-acre option; $2.6M option fee Mar 2026).

PLP lease development agreement specifies milestone-gated rent: $2M/yr during development, $8M/yr from first construction anniversary (CPI escalation), plus power-generation revenue share. Operating rent has not commenced.
PowerBridge agreement is an option through March 2027 with up to two one-year extensions; disclosed cash is option fees only, not operating rent.

gap_resolutions.acceptance_test: Normalized owner cash reconciled to disclosed revenue and capital needs across a cycle.
gap_resolutions.resolution: FY2025 MD&A attributes growth to recurring volume, easement mix, and 2024 acquisitions—not a disclosed one-time item. Fee-engine proof normalizes to $220M EBITDA (2026 guide midpoint) with $4.2M maintenance capex cited from filings.

gap_resolutions.acceptance_test: Low/base/high tied to contractual milestones and LB net ownership after capital.
gap_resolutions.resolution: Enforceable economics documented via PLP and PowerBridge (DEF 14A). Cash received today ($10.6M deposits/options) stays outside operating fee engine. Future rent is milestone-gated; alpha_digital_option base remains $0; high case remains sensitivity only.
gap_resolutions.valuation_link: alpha_digital_option calculation_proof updated with PLP/PowerBridge fact nodes; outputs unchanged.

valuation_controls: Do not promote PLP/PowerBridge future rent into fee-engine base until construction milestones convert.
Treat Q1 2026 FCF run-rate as upside sensitivity, not Lawrence normalization.
Keep overlap_key lb_current_operations for monetized surface fees; lb_alpha_digital for pre-rent digital options.
conclusion: Both curated evidence blockers are met. Contract may advance to decision_grade with proofs intact and base digital option at zero until operating rent commences.
